title: Bare Bones - Gilded Dark GUI
description: A dark, gilded twist on the minimalist Bare Bones resource pack 🟡
body:
## 🪶Bare Bones - Gilded Dark GUI Edition

This is a dark GUI add-on for the Bare Bones resourcepack.  
It brings a sleek dark mode to Minecraft’s clean Bare Bones style.  
Experience a modern, elegant interface with rich black and gold accents while keeping the minimal aesthetic you love.
![Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/21ffa7dcbe28ce67d234cbf90f951c228a5f0a13_0.webp)
### Features  
🔸Polished black & gold design for a premium look.  
🔸Lightweight & vanilla-friendly – only GUI textures are changed.  
🔸Minimalist style to match the Bare Bones theme.  
🔸No blocks, items, or sounds modified.  

---
Perfect for players who want a refined, immersive GUI that stays true to the Bare Bones experience.
